_doc: the demo store's rhythm — every job disabled on purpose; nothing arms itself until you enable it.

expire_sweep._note: flip pending approvals past their expiry to expired (gate behavior 5) — runs first, so nothing stale looks approvable

sync._note: the spine lands products + orders from Shopify

propose._note: the workers' standing turn — a queue of repairs runs in hourly batches, then it finds nothing and reports so

audit._note: read-only catalog health score over landed facts -> reports/

evaluate._note: the watching pass over the store's watch-list

analyst._note: the analyst's six ruled hunts over landed facts — findings only, minted through watching's door. ships disabled: arming is the owner's keystroke

ntfy._doc: push reach (spec/experience.md: notify-only — the item and a deep link, never the decision). server AND topic are null by default: unconfigured means every push is skipped with an honest log line, never sent to a silent third-party default. point server at an ntfy instance you chose and pick a private topic. link_base is where deep links point — set it to the tailscale hostname when the phone needs reach.
